mapper.select: SELECT a.*, c.college_name, c.college_type, c.province, c.city, g.group_code, g.group_name, g.require_subjects, m.major_name, m.major_code FROM dy_admission_data a LEFT JOIN dy_college c ON a.college_id = c.id LEFT JOIN dy_college_major_group g ON a.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN dy_major m ON a.major_id = m.id WHERE a.college_id = #{collegeId} AND a.province = #{province} AND a.category = #{category} ORDER BY a.year DESC, a.batch
